text:
NAME: PTNT_ADD_ON_PYMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center amount field 
(REV_CNTR_PTNT_ADD_ON_PMT_AMT) that is on any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., 
sum of the REV_CNTR_PTNT_ADD_ON_PMT_AMT reported on the claims that comprise the stay). 

This field is new in October 2014. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
